name: Earl's Mozzarella Meat Loaf
recipeIngredient: 4 oz part-skim mozzarella cheese, cut into 1/4-inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to moderate (375°F).
2. Line a jelly-roll pan with aluminum foil.
3. In a large skillet, sauté onion in olive oil over medium heat for 3 minutes.
4. Add red pepper, garlic, basil, and thyme; sauté for an additional 5 minutes.
5. Combine beef, pork, oats, egg whites, mozzarella, Parmesan, parsley (if using), salt, and black pepper in a large bowl.
6. Mix in the vegetable mixture.
7. Shape into a large oval on the prepared pan.
8. Bake at moderate temperature (375°F) for 30 minutes.
9. Brush loaf with catsup.
10. Bake an additional 25 minutes or until cooked through.
11. Let stand for 10 minutes before slicing.
Judith's Notes: I would bake this meat loaf in a loaf pan due to the possibility of grease escaping from the jelly roll pan. After 30 minutes, spoon off some of the fat.
